name: SHORT EXPIRY-CLEARANCE: Bonnie Kitten Food - Chicken 0.5kg
shortDescription: Fully balanced, chicken protein-containing all-natural dry kitten food kibble carefully formulated by cat nutritionists to meet the nutritional requirements of all puppy breeds.
description: Bonnie Chicken Kitten food , fully-balanced, chicken protein-containing all natural kitten food carefully formulated by cat / dog nutritionists to meet the nutritional requirements of all kitten breeds. Chicken meal has been used as animal protein source. The balance of omega 3 & 6 is provided by using flaxseed . Yucca plant provides ammonia and odour control, increase absorption of nutrients, strengthens the immune system and optimises animal growth and performance. A good intestinal health and performance is provided by CitriStim which is a source of pathogen-binding mannaoligsacharride , immune provide beta-glucans and immune-supportive yeast. Healthy skin and shiny coat is supported by using brewer's yeast . Muscles, organs and nerve cells are supported, and the immune system strengthened by using whey powder . Rich vitamin contents. NUTRIENT COMPONENTS Protein........................ 36% Fat ......................19% Crude Ash ........................ 8% Crude Cellulose (Fiber)....................... 3.5% INGREDIENTS: Chicken Proteins (dehydrated), Wheat, Corn, Animal Fat, Dried Beet Pulp, Corn Gluten, Liver Flavour, Salt, Linseed, Brewer?s Yeast, Taurine, Yucca Schidigera, Mannan-Oligosaccharides, Beta Glucan, Preservatives - Antioxidants. MINERALS: Calcium, Phosphorus, Sodium, Ionide, Zinc, Copper, Potassium Chloride, Iron, Selenium. VITAMINS: Vit. A, Vit. D, Vit. E, Vit. C, Vit. B1 - B2 - B3 (niacin) - B6 - B12 - B7 (biotin) - B9 (folic acid), Vit. K, Choline, Calcium Pantotetan.
